name: Human albumin
indications:
## Main indications

Plasma volume expander. Burns.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 0,5–1 g/kg according to indication (paracentesis: 6–8 g/L of ascites removed).

pediatrico.dose: Shock: Albumin 5% in 0.9% NaCl = 5–10 mL/kg (0,25–0,50 g/kg). Maximum dose: 6 g/kg/day
pediatrico.presentation: See Human albumin evidence-based use (CIME Bulletin) 50 mL vial 20%
pediatrico.notes: Infusion rate: 0,25–1 mL/min. See Colloid Solutions (CIME Bulletin)

neonatal.dose: Replacement in neonatal shock per NICU protocol.

stability:
## Stability

- Use immediately after spiking; do not mix with other drugs.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Heart failure from volume overload, urticaria.

bibliography.citation: Hospital de Pediatría SAMIC Prof. Dr. Juan P. Garrahan. Institutional Pharmaceutical Formulary — Albúmina Humana* (code 0007, ATC B05AA).
